# Nestra — Safe Social Platform for Students (Aged 6 to 16)

> Nestra is a safe, moderated social networking platform designed exclusively for students, children, and teens aged 6 to 16 years old.

## Overview
Nestra provides a positive, child-friendly digital environment where young users (aged 6-16) can safely connect with friends ("Birdies"), share educational and inspiring short-form posts ("Chirps"), and discover curated vertical videos ("Reels").

## Key Safety & Moderation Features
- **Age-Appropriate Community (Ages 6-16)**: Built specifically for school students and young teens to learn, express themselves, and interact in a peer-appropriate space.
- **Automated Bad-Word & Harmful Content Filtering**: Built-in content filtering automatically screens and blocks bad words, bullying, abusive language, and inappropriate content to ensure a clean feed.
- **Safe Birdie Connections**: Friend connections ("Birdies") encourage positive peer engagement and safe communication.
- **Clean Chirps & Reels**: Short posts ("Chirps") and videos ("Reels") are curated and moderated for a safe learning and sharing experience.

## Core Terminology
- **Nestra**: The platform name.
- **Birdies**: Friends and connected peers on Nestra.
- **Chirps**: Safe short-form text updates and posts.
- **Reels**: Educational and entertaining short vertical videos.

## Contact & Information
- Official Website: https://nestra.app
- Audience: Students & children aged 6 to 16 years
- Content Rating: Safe for Kids / Educational & Moderated Social Platform
